original_image_tags: Head-and-shoulders black-and-white photograph of Drew Pearson wearing a suit and tie. Caption below photo reads "PEARSON".

elements.description: One black and white portrait photograph of a man wearing a hat, labeled 'PEARSON' below the image. The image is embedded within a newspaper clipping titled 'Reports Plentiful, 'Saucers' Nil' by Drew Pearson.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on a black-and-white portrait photograph of a man labeled 'PEARSON', but Description B adds a hat and newspaper context not mentioned in A, without contradiction.
